references.hebrew: יוֹצֵ֥ר אוֹר֙ וּבוֹרֵ֣א חֹ֔שֶׁךְ עֹשֶׂ֥ה שָׁל֖וֹם וּב֣וֹרֵא רָ֑ע אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה עֹשֶׂ֥ה כׇל־אֵֽלֶּה׃ {פ}
references.english:
I form light and create darkness,
I make weal and create woe—
I GOD do all these things.
Hear, O Israel! The ETERNAL is our God, the ETERNAL alone.bThe ETERNAL is our God, the ETERNAL alone Cf. Rashbam, Ibn Ezra; see Zech. 14.9. In contrast to others “The LORD our God, the LORD is one.”

references.hebrew: וְהָיָ֗ה אִם־שָׁמֹ֤עַ תִּשְׁמְעוּ֙ אֶל־מִצְוֺתַ֔י אֲשֶׁ֧ר אָנֹכִ֛י מְצַוֶּ֥ה אֶתְכֶ֖ם הַיּ֑וֹם לְאַהֲבָ֞ה אֶת־יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹֽהֵיכֶם֙ וּלְעׇבְד֔וֹ בְּכׇל־לְבַבְכֶ֖ם וּבְכׇל־נַפְשְׁכֶֽם׃
references.english: If, then, you obey the commandments that I enjoin upon you this day, loving the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God and rendering service with all your heart and soul,

references.hebrew: מֵרָח֕וֹק יְהֹוָ֖ה נִרְאָ֣ה לִ֑י וְאַהֲבַ֤ת עוֹלָם֙ אֲהַבְתִּ֔יךְ עַל־כֵּ֖ן מְשַׁכְתִּ֥יךְ חָֽסֶד׃
references.english:
GOD was revealedbrevealed Heb. adds “to me”; emendation yields “to him.” long ago.
Eternal love I conceived for you then;
Therefore I continue My grace to you.
